title: Better Rotten
description: BetterRotten adds a small but immersive way to recycle rotten flesh instead of letting it pile up in chests. Turn zombie drops into useful leather scraps, combine them back into full leather, and integrate the cycle into your survival progression. The mod
body:
BetterRotten adds a small but immersive way to recycle rotten flesh instead of letting it pile up in chests. 
Turn zombie drops into useful leather scraps, combine them back into full leather, and integrate the cycle into your survival progression. 
The mod is lightweight, fully vanilla‑friendly, and designed to drop into any Fabric modpack without breaking balance.
